title: OKE: Secrets and RBAC Abuse
description: Detects Kubernetes secret reads and RBAC backdoor creation, including cluster-admin ClusterRoleBinding grants to workload service accounts.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and ('Span Attributes' like '*k8s.resource=secrets*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*clusterrolebindings*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*cluster-admin*' or msg like '*ClusterRoleBinding granted*') | stats count as Events, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces, unique('Source IP') as SourceIPs, unique('Process Command Line') as Commands by 'Attack Stage', 'MITRE Technique ID', 'Security Severity', 'Host Name' | sort -Events

ask_ai_prompts: Identify which service account and Kubernetes action created the highest-risk RBAC or secret access event.
